chunks.en: Today I want to talk about starting my work computer.
chunks.ja: 今日は仕事用のパソコンを起動することについて話したいです。

chunks.en: First I press the power button and wait.
chunks.ja: まず電源ボタンを押して待ちます。

chunks.en: Then I type my password to log in.
chunks.ja: それからパスワードを入力してログインします。

chunks.en: Sometimes it is slow in the morning.
chunks.ja: 朝は遅いこともあります。

chunks.en: So I get some coffee and wait a little.
chunks.ja: だからコーヒーを持ってきて少し待ちます。

chunks.en: After that I open the apps I need.
chunks.ja: その後、必要なアプリを開きます。

chunks.en: I usually open my email and chat first.
chunks.ja: たいていメールとチャットを最初に開きます。

chunks.en: That's how I start my work computer every day.
chunks.ja: そうやって私は毎日仕事用のパソコンを起動します。

outline: Opening: talk about starting my work computer
Point 1: press power, wait, and log in
Point 2: it's slow in the morning, then open apps
Wrap-up: this is my daily start

modelTalk.text: I start my work computer every morning. First, I press the power button. Then I wait a little. The screen turns on slowly. I type my password to log in. I use the same password every day. Sometimes it's slow in the morning. I just sit and wait. I drink my coffee. Then the computer is ready. I open the apps I need. I open my email first. After that, I open my chat app. Then I open my work files. Now I'm ready to start. It's a simple routine. I do it every day. I don't think about it much.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about starting my work computer.
chunks.ja: 今日は仕事用のパソコンを起動することについて話したいです。

chunks.en: First I press the power button and wait.
chunks.ja: まず電源ボタンを押して待ちます。

chunks.en: Then I type my password to log in.
chunks.ja: それからパスワードを入力してログインします。

chunks.en: Sometimes it is slow in the morning.
chunks.ja: 朝は動きが遅いこともあります。

chunks.en: When it is slow, I make some coffee and wait.
chunks.ja: 遅いときは、コーヒーを入れて待ちます。

chunks.en: After that I open the apps I need.
chunks.ja: その後、必要なアプリを開きます。

chunks.en: So that is how I start my work day.
chunks.ja: というわけで、これが私の一日の仕事の始め方です。

outline: Wrap-up: open apps and start the day

modelTalk.text: I want to tell you about my mornings. First I press the power button. Then I wait for a little bit. The screen turns on slowly. I see the login box. So I type my password. Then I press enter and log in. Sometimes it's really slow in the morning. I don't know why. Maybe it's tired too. I just wait and drink my coffee. After that, it's ready to work. Then I open the apps I need. I open my email first. Next I open my chat and my notes. Now I'm all set. I'm ready to start my day. That's my simple morning routine.
